vocabulary.example: The engineer explained why creepage distance was relevant to the compliance decision.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師說明了沿面距離與符合性判定的關聯。

vocabulary.example: The technician verified pollution degree before connecting the sample.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術員在連接樣品前確認了污染等級。

vocabulary.example: The team evaluated the technical risk related to material group.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊評估了與材料群組相關的技術風險。

vocabulary.example: The team reviewed comparative tracking index before approving the Day 021 test configuration.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊在核准第 021 天的測試配置前審查了相比漏電起痕指數。

vocabulary.example: The reviewer checked working voltage against the controlled procedure.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 審查人員依受控程序確認工作電壓。

vocabulary.example: The test log records the condition associated with printed wiring board.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試日誌記錄了與印刷電路板相關的條件。

vocabulary.example: We confirmed cemented joint before releasing the measurement result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 我們在發布量測結果前確認了膠合接點。

vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates groove width under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估溝槽寬度。

vocabulary.example: The report links insulating surface to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將絕緣表面連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.example: The engineer compared micro-environment with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將微環境與核准基準進行比較。

common_sentences.english: Could you record pollution degree in the test log?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 可以請你把污染等級記錄在測試日誌嗎？

common_sentences.english: The latest result indicates a change in material group.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 最新結果顯示材料群組有所變化。

common_sentences.english: Please keep comparative tracking index unchanged during the comparison.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 進行比較時，請保持相比漏電起痕指數不變。

common_sentences.english: The team will repeat working voltage under the worst-case condition.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 團隊會在最嚴苛條件下重新執行工作電壓。

common_sentences.english: The report clearly identifies the method used for printed wiring board.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 報告已清楚標示印刷電路板所使用的方法。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified creepage distance and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認沿面距離並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for pollution degree?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對污染等級的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Certification document missing — Creepage investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 驗證文件缺漏：沿面距離調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 021 shows a repeatable certification document missing condition.
debug_case.background: The Creepage configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The submitted model list does not match the report.
A critical component certificate has expired.
check_steps: Compare the submission checklist with the technical file.
Verify certificate scope, model, and validity.
corrective_actions: Update controlled documents and obtain approval.
Record the corrected revision in the submission index.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Creepage design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Creepage.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「沿面距離」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Creepage, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「creepage distance」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: creepage distance 指的是「沿面距離」。

quiz.prompt: 「污染等級」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 pollution degree。

quiz.prompt: The team evaluated the technical risk related to ________.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 團隊評估了與材料群組相關的技術風險。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 material group。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 comparative tracking index（相比漏電起痕指數）。

quiz.prompt: Please introduce yourself as an RF compliance engineer. Connect your answer to Creepage.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請用專業經歷、核心能力與成果組成 60 秒自我介紹。 並連結到「沿面距離」。
quiz.answer: I am an RF compliance engineer with hands-on experience in measurement, debugging, and certification. I communicate test evidence clearly and work across design, laboratory, and customer teams. In Creepage, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
